name: [] Simon "Ghost" Riley []
description:
((NSFW)) - Late night shower

Ghost is a good friend of yours, but what happens when he catches you in the showers?

Not much of an update on the bot details, just the description. Also, tysm you guys for the reviews, I really wasn't expecting this bot to get as big as it did.

Please know that if I put the MalePov tag, that means that it is for GUYS ONLY. I make gender neutral bots, but will NOT make female specific bots for my own personal reasons. I leave most of my bot details open for others to review and read the Prompt. PLEASE DO NOT STEAL BOTS! Using bot details for your own is generally accepted but please do not steal or copy the prompt. That is plagiarism and is ILLEGAL. If I find that any of my bots hand been stolen/plagiarized I WILL report it.

IMPORTANT - Hey! Just wanted to let y'all know I'm going to remake this bot! The original will stay up but I'm going to tweak the bot details and rewrite the prompt on a new bot. I'll put the link here when it's finished, stay tuned! [updated Jan 24]
